query: DELETE FROM propostas WHERE leadId IN (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead %' OR nome LIKE 'Test%' OR nome LIKE 'Teste%'); DELETE FROM lead_estoque WHERE leadId IN (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead %' OR nome LIKE 'Test%' OR nome LIKE 'Teste%'); DELETE FROM historico_atribuicoes WHERE leadId IN (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead %' OR nome LIKE 'Test%' OR nome LIKE 'Teste%'); DELETE FROM analises_credito WHERE leadId IN (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead %' OR nome LIKE 'Test%' OR nome LIKE 'Teste%'); DELETE FROM documentacoes WHERE leadId IN (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead %' OR nome LIKE 'Test%' OR nome LIKE 'Teste%');
